title: Lost Lover
wikitext: {{No official name}} '''Lost Lover''' is an unnamed [[miniquest]] not shown in the quest list. It is started by talking to either [[Fabia]] or [[Xilo]] in the [[Tlati Rainforest]]. There are no rewards for completing the miniquest. {{Quest details |start = Speak to either [[Fabia]] or [[Xilo]] in the [[Tlati Rainforest]] |difficulty = |description = Reunite Fabia and Xilo by solving their miscommunication. |length = Very Short |items = None |recommended = None |kills = None |leagueRegion = {{LeagueRegion|Varlamore}} — location requirement }} ==Walkthrough== ===Starting Out=== Speak to either [[Fabia]] or [[Xilo]] in the [[Tlati Rainforest]]. * [[Fabia]] can be found by the southern magic trees west of [[Kastori]]. She claims she agreed to meet Xilo by the "magic tree," but Xilo has not arrived. * [[Xilo]] can be found by the river bank west of the [[Crypt of Tonali]] lift platform. She claims she agreed to meet Fabia by the "special tree," but Fabia has not arrived. ===Finishing up=== Speak to either [[Fabia]] or [[Xilo]], whoever you did not speak to first. One will leave their current location to join the other. ==Rewards== None ==Transcript== {{Hastranscript|quest}} ==Trivia== * While there is no official name for the miniquest, the config names Jagex uses for the characters are tlati_lost_lover_fabia_vis and tlati_lost_lover_xilo_vis. * Despite the name of the miniquest, dialogue hints,{{CiteNPC|npc=Xilo|quote=This was the tree where we first met. It was a lovely day! A botanical tour of the rainforest, but the only thing I found myself looking at was her...|loc=Lost Lover}}{{CiteNPC|npc=Fabia|quote=I suppose she may be where we first met... but this is where we shared our first... you know...|loc=Lost Lover}} and the examine text of the two characters ("Love leads her to places less explored."), Fabia is offended when the player assumes that she and Xilo are anything more than friends. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Miniquests}}
